_meta.description: New Zealand payer seed data: ACC + major health insurers (Phase 40 Superseding)
_meta.source: ACC (Accident Compensation Corporation) + Financial Markets Authority NZ Insurer Registry
_meta.notes: ACC is the universal no-fault accident compensation scheme. Public hospital care is free. Private insurers cover elective surgery, specialist visits, and dental.

payers.name: Accident Compensation Corporation (ACC)
payers.enrollmentNotes: All treatment providers must register with ACC. Claims via ACC API (OAuth2 + REST). Bulk claims via ACC Claim API or HealthLink secure messaging.

endpoints.notes: ACC Claim API v2 (REST/JSON, OAuth2). Test environment available.

payers.name: Southern Cross Health Insurance
payers.enrollmentNotes: Largest NZ private insurer (~60% market share). Provider registration + claims via Southern Cross provider portal.

payers.name: nib New Zealand Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: Australian-owned NZ insurer. Provider claims via nib provider portal.

payers.name: Partners Life Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: NZ life and health insurer. Claims via adviser/provider portal.
